hall_of_fame.title: support searching across multiple lines
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: The regex-automata 0.4 crate finally makes bounded multi-line search viable without catastrophic backtracking.
With current tooling advancements, Deno can now complete its dev tool support, enabling a stable 1.0 release.

hall_of_fame.title: React Fire: Modernizing React DOM
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: React Fire succeeds now due to advancements in React, TypeScript, and web development, enabling a more maintainable and efficient implementation.

last_resurrection.title: Suggestion: Regex-validated string type
last_resurrection.one_line_why: This feature would succeed now due to TypeScript's improved type system capabilities and the growing demand for more precise type.
